# uptimekuma_notification_halopsa (Resource)

HaloPSA notification resource

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "uptimekuma_notification_halopsa" "example" {
  name        = "HaloPSA Notifications"
  webhook_url = "https://halopsa.example.com/webhook/YOUR_TOKEN"
  username    = "your-username"
  password    = "your-password"
  is_active   = true
  is_default  = false
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Notification name
- `password` (String, Sensitive) The password for HaloPSA authentication.
- `username` (String) The username for HaloPSA authentication.
- `webhook_url` (String, Sensitive) The HaloPSA webhook URL to which notifications will be sent.

### Optional

- `apply_existing` (Boolean)
- `is_active` (Boolean)
- `is_default` (Boolean)

### Read-Only

- `id` (Number) Notification identifier
